headline: Umicore - Transparency notification by BlackRock, Inc.
summary: Transparency notification byBlackRock, Inc. In accordance with article 14, § 1 of the law of 2 May 2007 on the disclosure of major holdings, Umicore was recently notified by BlackRock, Inc. that it has crossed the legal threshold of 5% for the direct voting rights downwards on 30 June 2026. The total holding of direct voting rights and equivalent financial instruments of BlackRock, Inc. stands at 5.65% on 30 June 2026. Summary of the move: Date on which the threshold was crossedDate of notificat

headline: Bitcoin ETF News: FBTC and ARKB Drive $221.7M Bitcoin ETF Reversal as IBIT Bleeds

headline: BlackRock (BLK) Stock Fair Value Edges Higher As Analysts Debate Earnings And Flows
summary: BlackRock’s updated valuation work now points to a fair value of US$1,251.69, a slight move from the prior US$1,246.25. This underscores how small tweaks to key inputs can still shift the overall price target. This change comes as analysts on both sides of the debate adjust BlackRock models, with some lifting targets on earnings expectations while others trim them on concerns about flows and fee growth. As you read on, you will see how these moving pieces shape the evolving narrative around...
